name: 3D Polaroid Breakout Effect
body:
---
title: 3D Polaroid Breakout Effect
category: 3d
tags:
  - 3d
  - chibi
  - character
  - realistic
author: '[@dotey](https://x.com/dotey)'
preview: /media/3d/3d-polaroid-breakout-effect.webp
---

Convert the character in the scene into a 3D chibi-style figure, placed inside a Polaroid photo. The photo paper is being held by a human hand. The character is stepping out of the Polaroid frame, creating a visual effect of breaking through the two-dimensional photo border and entering the real-world 3D space.

## Reference Image
A half-body or full-body single person photo.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/dotey/status/1908238003169903060)

## Example Output
![3D Polaroid Breakout Effect](/media/3d/3d-polaroid-breakout-effect.webp)
description_en: An image-generation prompt that turns a person's photo into a chibi 3D figure stepping out of a hand-held Polaroid frame.
description_zh: 一个图像生成提示词，把人物照片变成从手持拍立得相纸中走出来的 Q 版 3D 角色。
long_en: The prompt converts a half- or full-body reference photo into a 3D chibi figure that appears to break through the 2D Polaroid border into real space, held by a human hand. It is aimed at playful single-person portrait edits.
long_zh: 提示词把半身或全身参考照片转换成 Q 版 3D 角色，呈现出冲破二维拍立得边框、进入现实空间的效果，并由一只手拿着，适合趣味单人肖像改图。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model and uploading a personal photo to a third-party service; no code execution.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型，并将个人照片上传到第三方服务；不执行任何代码。
